summary: Completed testing of Declaration Status Management and Soft Delete features (iteration 26). All backend tests passed (17/17). Frontend UI verified: status badges show correct colors, status dropdown has all options with colored dots, delete button opens confirmation dialog.
critical_code_review_comments: Status update endpoint correctly uses PUT with FormData (nuovo_stato, motivo optional)
Soft delete endpoint correctly sets stato='eliminata' and returns recoverable=True
Frontend status badge colors correctly implemented: GREEN (presentata), YELLOW (bozza, inviata, doc_incompleta, in_revisione, pronta), RED (errata, non_presentare), GREY (archiviata, eliminata)
Status dropdown shows all 9 status options with correct colored dots
Delete confirmation dialog shows clear warning and allows cancellation
seed_data_creation: None - used existing declaration for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Declaration status management and soft delete features fully functional. Status update uses PUT /api/declarations/tax-returns/{id}/status with FormData (nuovo_stato required, motivo optional). Soft delete uses DELETE /api/declarations/tax-returns/{id}?soft_delete=true. Frontend DeclarationDetailView shows status badge with correct colors and status dropdown with all options.

frontend_ui.status_badge_yellow: Working - pending states show yellow badge
frontend_ui.status_dropdown: Working - shows all 9 options with colored dots
frontend_ui.status_change: Working - updates badge and shows toast notification
frontend_ui.delete_button: Working - shows red 'Elimina' button for admin
frontend_ui.delete_dialog: Working - shows confirmation with warning message
frontend_ui.delete_cancel: Working - 'Annulla' button closes dialog without deleting
